question: The chart shows smartphone market share. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Brand A has the largest market share among all categories.
options.B: Brand D has a larger market share than Brand A.
options.C: Brand C and Brand B together have a larger market share than Others.
options.D: Others account for the smallest market share.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Brand A: 40%; Others: 25%; Brand D: 15%; Brand C: 10%; Brand B: 10%.
